creator: jeremyhu@apple.com
text:
revision 1.5 is 12 years old.  I suggest you update whatever you used to find it as the current source.

This is against version 1.31 of mktemp.c :

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/lib/libc/stdio/mktemp.c?only_with_tag=MAIN
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/~checkout~/src/lib/libc/stdio/mktemp.c?rev=1.31

On Nov 3, 2009, at 04:41, Maxim Konovalov wrote:

> Hello,
> 
> According to
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/usr.bin/mktemp/mktemp.c?rev=1.5
> there is no such code in FreeBSD.
> 
> What version of mktemp.c do you use?
> 
> -- 
> Maxim Konovalov
